2025/26 Season · Gameweek 37

Dallas Premier League

12-team Sleeper EPL dynasty fantasy

Featured Manager · GW37

erozier clinches the DPL title

A 25-12 regular season with the league's best offense, three games clear with one to play

After 37 weeks, the math is settled. erozier sits at 25-12 with the highest points-for total in the league (3,460.75) and a three-game cushion that no one can erase in the final week. He led the table for the bulk of the season, weathered a single stumble against bjennings28 in GW33, and answered every challenge from Noahvillasana17, brendog2814, and JordiCarb. The 2025/26 DPL champion. GW38 is the victory lap.
